testcase.name: test_fixtures_returns_is_special

failure.message: AssertionError: Match missing is_special field assert 'is_special' in {'away_score': 0, 'away_team': 'Roma', 'competition': 'Serie A', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_x3_badge_fields.py:217: in test_fixtures_returns_is_special assert "is_special" in match, f"Match missing is_special field" E AssertionError: Match missing is_special field E assert 'is_special' in {'away_score': 0, 'away_team': 'Roma', 'competition': 'Serie A', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}

testcase.name: test_fixtures_returns_multiplier

failure.message: AssertionError: Match missing multiplier field assert 'multiplier' in {'away_score': 0, 'away_team': 'Roma', 'competition': 'Serie A', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_x3_badge_fields.py:235: in test_fixtures_returns_multiplier assert "multiplier" in match, f"Match missing multiplier field" E AssertionError: Match missing multiplier field E assert 'multiplier' in {'away_score': 0, 'away_team': 'Roma', 'competition': 'Serie A', 'created_at': '2026-02-15T20:10:49.881868+00:00', ...}
